# knownimports.txt — known Python import names (one per line)
# stdlib is added at runtime via sys.stdlib_module_names, so it is NOT duplicated here.
# pip list is also merged at runtime. This file is the curated third-party supplement.
# Add entries here when you encounter packages the runtime pip list doesn't cover.
